articles.title: Ethereum on Cusp of a Massive Move, According to Crypto Trader – Here Are His Targets
articles.description: A widely followed crypto analyst says that Ethereum (ETH) is gearing up for a massive swing to the upside.

articles.title: Ledn to drop ETH support in favor of fully custodied bitcoin-only model amid rising BTC-backed lending competition
articles.description: The platform is also discontinuing the lending of client assets to generate interest, eliminating third-party credit risk.

articles.title: Kraken Taps Solana Blockchain To Roll Out Tokenized American Stocks and ETFs for Non-US Traders
articles.description: The San Francisco-based crypto exchange Kraken is bringing tokenized versions of popular US-listed stocks and exchange-traded funds (ETF) to its clients in select non-US markets. In a statement, Kraken says it partnered with the tokenized stocks and ETF issuer Backed to launch xStocks on the Solana (SOL) blockchain.

articles.title: Why Isn’t XRP Pumping? The Real Reason Behind the Silence
articles.description: Despite of all, XRP’s price has stayed stuck between $2 and $2. 90. So what’s happening? Why hasn’t the price taken off yet? Let’s break it down

articles.title: Bitcoin Bulls Poised? BTC Consolidates Near ATH With Eyes on Higher Highs
articles.description: Bitcoin price started a fresh increase and traded to a new all-time high above the $111,500 zone. BTC is now consolidating and might aim for an increase toward $113,200 Bitcoin started a fresh upward move from the $108,000 zone. The price is trading above $108,000 and the 100 hourly Simple moving average. There is a key bullish trend line forming with support at $110,000 on the hourly chart of the BTC/USD pair (data feed from Kraken)

articles.title: Is Ethereum Price Ready To Target $3,000 Soon? Analysts Opine
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH) price gained interest from investors after displaying a bullish pattern that may cause a major breakout. Analysts suggest that if ETH price breaks above the $2,588 resistance, a surge toward $3,000 is likely.
